roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISMISSAL & PENDING SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/SAWD/MO PC 1385: PLEAD TO OTHER CHARGE/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE DEFENDANTENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X: ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS  MAY BE ADDEDAS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO, 20004986,/
